zh.lifeSummary: 當William Powell於1478年出生在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾時，他的父親Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell41歲，母親Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly38歲。他於1500年與Agnes Peche在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1543年5月22日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Powell于1478年出生在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾时，他的父亲Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell41岁，母亲Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly38岁。他于1500年与Agnes Peche在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1543年5月22日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯。

nameMeanings.name: Powell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

variants.name: Powel
meanings: North German: from a form of the personal name   Paul  .

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Powles
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Powells, itself a variant of Powell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Powell was born in 1478, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell, was 41 and his mother, Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly, was 38. He married Agnes Peche in 1500, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 22 May 1543, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes Peche en 1500, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1543, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Agnes Peche nel 1500, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. ja.lifeSummary: William Powellが1478年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで生まれた時，父Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powellは41歳，母Catherine Janet Seton of Huntlyは38歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでAgnes Pecheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1543年5月22日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Powell(이)가 1478년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Agnes Peche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1543년 5월 22일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Peche em 1500, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Powell родился в 1478 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Peche в 1500 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 22 мая 1543 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Peche en 1500, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1543, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
